activity_name: Record the data of the patient

substeps.description: Access the Hospital Information System (HIS).
Navigate to the new patient registration module.
Enter basic demographic information provided by the patient into the HIS.
Save the initial patient record in the HIS.

activity_name: Register the SSN of the patient

substeps.description: Request the patient's Social Security Number (SSN).
Enter the SSN into the designated field in the HIS.
Verify the entered SSN for accuracy with the patient.

activity_name: Register the Name of the patient

substeps.description: Request the patient's official identification document.
Read the patient's legal first and middle name(s) from the ID.
Enter the first and middle name(s) into the HIS.

activity_name: Register the Surname of the patient

substeps.description: Read the patient's family name from the official identification document.
Enter the family name into the HIS.
Confirm the spelling of the family name with the patient.
Access the referral document generation function in the HIS.
Generate the official registration confirmation document.
Send the document to the printer.
Retrieve the printed referral document from the printer.

activity_name: Archive the record in file system

substeps.description: Access the patient's completed registration record in the HIS.
Select the 'Archive Record' function within the HIS.
Confirm the successful archiving of the digital record.
